nodes.name: 新幾內亞高地
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞高地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括Chestnut forest rail、Archbold's nightjar、Modest tiger parrot等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 罗氏啸鹟
nodes.summary: 罗氏啸鹟（Pachycephala lorentzi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如罗氏啸鹟。

nodes.name: 罗氏啸鹟
nodes.summary: Lorentz's whistler (Pachycephala lorentzi) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae. It is found in the mid-western New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It was originally described as a subspecies of the regent whistler References
